description: arXiv:2510.24803v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Inference-time search over multi-agent systems (MAS) wastes compute when it cannot identify which agent's intermediate message advanced progress. We present the Multi-Agent System Process Reward Model (MASPRM), which scores routed transcripts (ordered sequences of messages between agents) and acts as an inference controller for step-leve...
author: Milad Yazdani, Mahdi Mostajabdaveh, Zirui Zhou, Ying Xiong
